body: Thanks for the follow-up, Diego — glad we had a chance to connect at the summit last week. I've been thinking more about the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal and I think there's a real opening for Halfway and [Tartan](orgs/tartan-vc) to co-lead the round if we can align on valuation expectations before the founder's deadline at end of month. From what I'm seeing, their edge in distributed energy orchestration is genuinely defensible, and the team's background in grid-scale deployments gives me more confidence than most Series A pitches I've seen in this space. I'd want to push for a board observer seat as part of our terms — something I've found invaluable at this stage when things move fast. Can we get on a call Thursday or Friday this week to compare notes before either of us goes back to Diego Ruiz with a term sheet?
